title: MCP Direct Tools and Full UI

tasks.title: Design opt-in direct tool config
tasks.description: Keep the proxy as default and support explicit directTools arrays for selected MCP tools.

tasks.title: Implement safe direct tool naming
tasks.description: Generate deterministic collision-safe names, sanitize invalid names, and skip conflicts with validation warnings.

tasks.title: Use cached metadata for direct tools
tasks.description: Build direct tool schemas from Step 3 metadata and avoid hanging agent startup on slow MCP servers.

tasks.title: Integrate direct tools with provider filtering
tasks.description: Expose direct MCP tools through existing tool metadata and allow provider-level enable/disable behavior.

tasks.title: Add structured MCP Settings panel
tasks.description: Add server list, status, transport type, tool count, errors, test, refresh, OAuth controls, and a link to raw JSON.

tasks.title: Add UI safety warnings
tasks.description: Warn about mutating tools, broad OAuth scopes, inline secret-looking config values, and large direct schemas.

tasks.title: Add direct tool and UI tests
tasks.description: Cover direct tool naming, collisions, provider filtering, metadata output, status rendering, and OAuth controls where present.

tasks.title: Verify Step 5 implementation
tasks.description: Run browser checks or Playwright for UI changes and run npm build.
